---
title: "colores"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Ejercicio clase

```{r}
color = c("rojos","roja","blanco","Blanco","vlanco","azul","hazul","asul","rojo","blanco")
edad = c(12,15,20,18,19,32,21,24,27,29)
DF <- data.frame(color, edad)
```

### Limpiar datos

```{r}
library(stringr)
DF
DF$color <- str_replace_all(DF$color, c("asul|hazul"="azul", "Blanco|vlanco"="blanco", "roja|rojos"="rojo"))
table(DF$color)
```
